verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
በሎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እመቦ ፡ እምደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ አው ፡ እምግዩራን ፡ እለ ፡ ገብኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እስራኤል
                  ፡ ዘአስተፅመደ ፡ ውሉዶ ፡ ለመልአክ ፡ ሞተ ፡ ለይሙት ፤ ሕዝብ ፡ እለ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ ለይወግርዎ ፡ በእበን ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt also say to the children of Israel, If there shall be any of the children of Israel, or of those who have become proselytes in Israel, who shall give of his seed to Moloch, let him be surely put to death; the nation upon the land shall stone him with stones.
translations.kjv: Again, thou shalt say to the children of Israel, Whosoever he be of the children of Israel, or of the strangers that sojourn in Israel, that giveth any of his seed unto Molech; he shall surely be put to death: the people of the land shall stone him with stones.

verses.geez:
ወአነኒ ፡ ኣቀውም ፡ ገጽየ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ወእደመስሶ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሕዝቡ ፡ እስመ ፡ ወሀቦ ፡ ውሉዶ ፡
                  ይፀመድ ፡ መልአከ ፡ ከመ ፡ ያርኵስ ፡ ቅድሳትየ ፡ ወከመ ፡ ያርኵስ ፡ ስመ ፡ ቅዱሳንየ ።

translations.lxx: And I will set my face against that man, and will cut him off from his people, because he has given of his seed to Moloch, to defile my sanctuary, and profane the name of them that are consecrated to me.
translations.kjv: And I will set my face against that man, and will cut him off from among his people; because he hath given of his seed unto Molech, to defile my sanctuary, and to profane my holy name.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ ተዐወርዎ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ወሰወሩ ፡ አዕይንቲሆሙ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ እንዘ ፡
                  ያስተፀምድ ፡ ውሉዶ ፡ ለመልአክ ፡ ወኢቀተልዎ ፤

translations.lxx: And if the natives of the land should in anywise overlook that man in giving of his seed to Moloch, so as not to put him to death;
translations.kjv: And if the people of the land do any ways hide their eyes from the man, when he giveth of his seed unto Molech, and kill him not:

verses.geez:
ወኣቀውም ፡ ገጽየ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ወላዕለ ፡ አዝማዲሁ ፡ ወእደመስሰ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ እለ ፡ ኀብሩ ፡
                  ምስሌሁ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይዘምዉ ፡ በመላእክት ፡ እምነ ፡ ሕዝቦሙ ።

translations.lxx: then will I set my face against that man and his family, and I will destroy him, and all who have been of one mind with him, so that he should go a whoring to the princes, from their people.
translations.kjv: Then I will set my face against that man, and against his family, and will cut him off, and all that go a whoring after him, to commit whoredom with Molech, from among their people.

verses.geez:
ወእመቦ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ እንተ ፡ ተለወት ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ሐርስ ፡ ወሰብአ ፡ ሥራያት ፡ ከመ ፡ ትዘምው ፡ ድኅሬሆሙ ፡ ኣቀውም ፡
                  ገጽየ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ ወእደመስሶ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሕዝ[ቡ] ።

translations.lxx: And the soul that shall follow those who have in them divining spirits, or enchanters, so as to go a whoring after them; I will set my face against that soul, and will destroy it from among its people.
translations.kjv: And the soul that turneth after such as have familiar spirits, and after wizards, to go a whoring after them, I will even set my face against that soul, and will cut him off from among his people.

verses.geez: ወኩኑ ፡ ቅዱሳነ ፡ እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ቅዱስ ፡ አምላክክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall be holy, for I the Lord your God am holy.
translations.kjv: Sanctify yourselves therefore, and be ye holy: for I am the LORD your God.

verses.geez: ወዕቀቡ ፡ ትእዛዝየ ፡ ወግበርዎ ፡ እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘይቄድሰክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall observe my ordinances, and do them: I am the Lord that sanctifies you.
translations.kjv: And ye shall keep my statutes, and do them: I am the LORD which sanctify you.

verses.geez:
ወእመቦ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ዘነበበ ፡ ሕሡመ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ አቡሁ ፡ አው ፡ ላዕለ ፡ እሙ ፡ ሞተ ፡ ለይሙት ፡ ዘነበበ ፡ ሕሡመ ፡
                  ላዕለ ፡ አቡሁ ፡ አው ፡ ላዕለ ፡ እሙ ፡ ጊጉይ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: Every man who shall speak evil of his father or of his mother, let him die the death; has he spoken evil of his father or his mother? he shall be guilty.
translations.kjv: For every one that curseth his father or his mother shall be surely put to death: he hath cursed his father or his mother; his blood shall be upon him.

verses.geez:
ወለእመቦ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ዘዘመወ ፡ በብእሲተ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ አው ፡ ለእመቦ ፡ ዘዘመወ ፡ በብእሲተ ፡ ካልኡ ፡ ሞተ ፡
                  ለይሙት ፡ ዘዘመወኒ ፡ ወእንተ ፡ ዘመወትኒ ።

translations.lxx: Whatever man shall commit adultery with the wife of a man, or whoever shall commit adultery with the wife of his neighbour, let them die the death, the adulterer and the adulteress.
translations.kjv: And the man that committeth adultery with another man’s wife, even he that committeth adultery with his neighbour’s wife, the adulterer and the adulteress shall surely be put to death.

verses.geez:
ወለእመቦ ፡ ዘሰከበ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ አቡሁ ፡ ኀፍረተ ፡ አቡሁ ፡ ከሠተ ፡ ሞተ ፡ ለይሙቱ ፡ ክልኤሆሙ ፡ ጊጉያን ፡
                  እሙንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And if any one should lie with his father's wife, he has uncovered his father's nakedness: let them both die the death, they are guilty.
translations.kjv: And the man that lieth with his father’s wife hath uncovered his father’s nakedness: both of them shall surely be put to death; their blood shall be upon them.

verses.geez:
ወለእመቦ ፡ ዘሰክበ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ወልዱ ፡ ሞተ ፡ ለይሙቱ ፡ ክልኤሆሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ ኀጢአተ ፡ ገብሩ ፡ ወጊጉያን
                  ፡ እሙንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And if any one should lie with his daughter-in-law, let them both be put to death; for they have wrought impiety, they are guilty.
translations.kjv: And if a man lie with his daughter in law, both of them shall surely be put to death: they have wrought confusion; their blood shall be upon them.

verses.geez:
ወለእመቦ ፡ ዘሰከበ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ተባዕት ፡ ከመ ፡ ምስለ ፡ አንስት ፡ ርኩሰ ፡ ገብሩ ፡ ክልኤሆሙ ፤ ሞተ ፡ ለይሙቱ ፡
                  ጊጉያን ፡ እሙንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And whoever shall lie with a male as with a woman, they have both wrought abomination; let them die the death, they are guilty.
translations.kjv: If a man also lie with mankind, as he lieth with a woman, both of them have committed an abomination: they shall surely be put to death; their blood shall be upon them.

verses.geez:
ዘነሥአ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ምስለ ፡ እማ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወበእሳት ፡ ለያውዕይዎሙ ፡ ኪያሁኒ ፡ ወኪያሆን ፡ ወኢትመጽእ ፡
                  ላዕሌክሙ ፡ ኀጢአት ።

translations.lxx: Whosoever shall take a woman and her mother, it is iniquity: they shall burn him and them with fire; so there shall not be iniquity among you.
translations.kjv: And if a man take a wife and her mother, it is wickedness: they shall be burnt with fire, both he and they; that there be no wickedness among you.

verses.geez: ወዘሰከበ ፡ ምስለ ፡ እንሰሳ ፡ ሞተ ፡ ለይሙት ፡ ወእንስሳሁኒ ፡ ቅትሉ ።

translations.lxx: And whosoever shall lie with a beast, let him die the death; and ye shall kill the beast.
translations.kjv: And if a man lie with a beast, he shall surely be put to death: and ye shall slay the beast.

verses.geez:
ወብእሲትኒ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ሖረት ፡ ኀበ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ይስክባ ፡ ቅትሉ ፡ ብእሲታኒ ፡ ወእንስሳሁኒ ፡ ሞተ ፡ ለይሙቱ ፡
                  ክልኤሆሙ ፡ ጊጉያን ፡ እሙንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And whatever woman shall approach any beast, so as to have connexion with it, ye shall kill the woman and the beast: let them die the death, they are guilty.
translations.kjv: And if a woman approach unto any beast, and lie down thereto, thou shalt kill the woman, and the beast: they shall surely be put to death; their blood shall be upon them.

verses.geez:
ዘሰክበ ፡ ምስለ ፡ እኅቱ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ እንተ ፡ እምአቡሁ ፡ ወለእመኒ ፡ እንተ ፡ እምእሙ ፡ ወርእየ ፡ ኀፍረታ ፡
                  ወይእቲኒ ፡ ርእየት ፡ ኀፍረቶ ፡ ፅእለት ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ለይሠረዉ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ ዘመዶሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ ከሠተ ፡ ኀፍረተ ፡
                  እኅቱ ፡ ወጌጋየ ፡ ይከውኖሙ ።

translations.lxx: Whosoever shall take his sister by his father or by his mother, and shall see her nakedness, and she see his nakedness, it is a reproach: they shall be destroyed before the children of their family; he has uncovered his sister's nakedness, they shall bear their sin.
translations.kjv: And if a man shall take his sister, his father’s daughter, or his mother’s daughter, and see her nakedness, and she see his nakedness; it is a wicked thing; and they shall be cut off in the sight of their people: he hath uncovered his sister’s nakedness; he shall bear his iniquity.

verses.geez:
ወብእሲኒ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ሰክበ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ብእሲት ፡ ትክት ፡ ወከሠተ ፡ ኀፍረታ ፡ ወከሠተ ፡ ነቅዓ ፡ ወይእቲነ ፡ ከሠተት
                  ፡ ክዕወተ ፡ ደማ ፡ ለይሠረዉ ፡ ክልኤሆሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሙላዶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And whatever man shall lie with a woman that is set apart for a flux, and shall uncover her nakedness, he has uncovered her fountain, and she has uncovered the flux of her blood: they shall both be destroyed from among their generation.
translations.kjv: And if a man shall lie with a woman having her sickness, and shall uncover her nakedness; he hath discovered her fountain, and she hath uncovered the fountain of her blood: and both of them shall be cut off from among their people.

verses.geez:
ወኢትክሥት ፡ ኀፍረተ ፡ እኅተ ፡ አቡከ ፡ ወእኅተ ፡ እምከ ፡ እስመ ፡ ዘመዶሙ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ከሠቱ ፡ ኀጢአተ ፡ ይከውኖሙ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy father's sister, or of the sister of thy mother; for that man has uncovered the nakedness of one near akin: they shall bear their iniquity.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy mother’s sister, nor of thy father’s sister: for he uncovereth his near kin: they shall bear their iniquity.

verses.geez: ወዘሰክበ ፡ ምስለ ፡ እንተ ፡ ዘመዱ ፡ ከሠተ ፡ ኀፍረተ ፡ ዘመዱ ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ ውሉድ ፡ ለይሙቱ ።

translations.lxx: Whosoever shall lie with his near kinswoman, has uncovered the nakedness of one near akin to him: they shall die childless.
translations.kjv: And if a man shall lie with his uncle’s wife, he hath uncovered his uncle’s nakedness: they shall bear their sin; they shall die childless.

verses.geez: ወብእሲኒ ፡ ዘሰክበ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ እኁሁ ፡ ከሠተ ፡ ኀፍረተ ፡ እኁሁ ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ ውሉድ ፡ ይሙቱ ።

translations.lxx: Whoever shall take his brother's wife, it is uncleanness; he has uncovered his brother's nakedness; they shall die childless.
translations.kjv: And if a man shall take his brother’s wife, it is an unclean thing: he hath uncovered his brother’s nakedness; they shall be childless.

verses.geez:
ወዕቀቡ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ትእዛዝየ ፡ ወግበርዎ ፡ ወኢትብእሰክሙ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስቴታ ፡ አነ ፡ ኣበውአክሙ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ትንበሩ ፡ ህየ ፡ ውስቴታ ።

translations.lxx: And keep ye all my ordinances, and my judgments; and ye shall do them, and the land shall not be aggrieved with you, into which I bring you to dwell upon it.
translations.kjv: Ye shall therefore keep all my statutes, and all my judgments, and do them: that the land, whither I bring you to dwell therein, spue you not out.

verses.geez: ወኢትሑሩ ፡ በሕገ ፡ አሕዛብ ፡ እለ ፡ [አወፅኦሙ ፡] እምኔክሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ገብሩ ፡ ወአስቈረርክዎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And walk ye not in the customs of the nations which I drive out from before you; for they have done all these things, and I have abhorred them:
translations.kjv: And ye shall not walk in the manners of the nation, which I cast out before you: for they committed all these things, and therefore I abhorred them.

verses.geez:
ወእቤለክሙ ፡ አንትሙ ፡ ትወርስዋ ፡ ለምድሮሙ ፡ ወአነ ፡ እሁበክሙዋ ፡ ከመ ፡ ታጥርይዋ ፡ ምድረ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትውኅዝ ፡
                  ሐሊበ ፡ ወመዓረ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ ዘፈለጥኩክሙ ፡ እምኵሉ ፡ አሕዛብ ።

translations.lxx: and I said to you, Ye shall inherit their land, and I will give it to you for a possession, even a land flowing with milk and honey: I am the Lord your God, who have separated you from all people.
translations.kjv: But I have said unto you, Ye shall inherit their land, and I will give it unto you to possess it, a land that floweth with milk and honey: I am the LORD your God, which have separated you from other people.

verses.geez:
ወፍልጡ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ዘኢኮነ ፡ ንጹሐ ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ዘንጹሕ ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ አዕዋፍ ፡
                  ዘንጹሕ ፡ ወዘኢኮነ ፡ ንጹሐ ፡ ወኢታርኵሱ ፡ ነፍሰክሙ ፡ በንስሳ ፡ ወበአዕዋፍ ፡ ወበኵሉ ፡ ዘይትሐወስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡
                  ዘፈለጥኩ ፡ ለክም ፡ ዘርኵስ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall make a distinction between the clean and the unclean cattle, and between clean and unclean birds; and ye shall not defile your souls with cattle, or with birds, or with any creeping things of the earth, which I have separated for you by reason of uncleanness.
translations.kjv: Ye shall therefore put difference between clean beasts and unclean, and between unclean fowls and clean: and ye shall not make your souls abominable by beast, or by fowl, or by any manner of living thing that creepeth on the ground, which I have separated from you as unclean.

verses.geez:
ወትከውኑኒ ፡ ቅዱሳነ ፡ እስመ ፡ ቅዱስ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ ዘፈለጥኩክሙ ፡ እምኵሉ ፡ አሕዛብ ፡ ከመ
                  ፡ ትኩኑኒ ፡ ሊተ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall be holy to me; because I the Lord your God am holy, who separated you from all nations, to be mine.
translations.kjv: And ye shall be holy unto me: for I the LORD am holy, and have severed you from other people, that ye should be mine.

verses.geez:
ወብእሲትኒ ፡ ወብእሲኒ ፡ ለእመቦ ፡ ዘኮነ ፡ ሐራስያነ ፡ አው ፡ ዘሥራይ ፡ ሞተ ፡ ለይሙቱ ፡ በእብን ፡ ወግርዎሙ ፡
                  እስመ ፡ ጊጉያን ፡ እሙንቱ ።

translations.lxx: And as for a man or woman whosoever of them shall have in them a divining spirit, or be an enchanter, let them both die the death: ye shall stone them with stones, they are guilty.
translations.kjv: A man also or woman that hath a familiar spirit, or that is a wizard, shall surely be put to death: they shall stone them with stones: their blood shall be upon them.
